title: Lead Source Attribution Audit Checklist for Growth Marketers
description: Growth marketers use this step-by-step audit to identify broken UTM tracking, misattributed conversions, and gaps in their lead source reporting inside HubSpot or GA4.
gumroad_description:
LEAD SOURCE ATTRIBUTION AUDIT CHECKLIST FOR GROWTH MARKETERS

You're losing money on marketing because your UTM parameters are broken and you don't know which channels actually convert.

WHO THIS IS FOR

— Growth marketers managing 5+ lead sources who can't trust their conversion data
— Demand gen leads responsible for reporting accuracy to leadership
— Marketing ops pros auditing HubSpot or GA4 before a platform migration

WHAT'S INSIDE

— 20 specific audit steps you run in 90 minutes, not weeks
— UTM validation framework that catches 80% of tracking gaps immediately
— Conversion misattribution checks for common HubSpot/GA4 sync errors
— Markdown checklist for daily use + JSON export for your martech stack
— Plain-English context for each step so you know why it matters

Fix your lead source reporting. Stop guessing where conversions come from.

Download and use it today.

Discover more tools like this at mini-on-ai.com
